final_response: Routed: Recurring IT access lag for external contractors (Feb→Mar→May pattern, 4-day provisioning cycle). Flagged for infrastructure/onboarding process review. Recommend tracking via change management or IT backlog to prevent first-week project delays.
actions: Identified pattern: three occurrences (Feb, Mar, May) of 4-day credential provisioning lag
Categorized issue: systemic onboarding/infrastructure problem, not isolated incident
Routed to: IT/Infrastructure team for process improvement
Recommended action: Add tracking mechanism to prevent recurrence
notes: User explicitly flagged recurrence pattern across three months—indicates systemic issue rather than isolated delay
Novel observation: contractor access provisioning is a bottleneck to project velocity
Routing logic: escalate to infrastructure/onboarding ownership for process review
No external system calls made; analysis based on observation pattern in user message
